ksa_text: Develop and enforce enterprise data management standards, requirements, and specifications across all data systems and operations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

Develop data standards, policies, and procedures
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: task from Data Governance (affinity 0.88); no GOV-specific signals and low domain affinity. STRM composite is strong (0.4556). A Data Owner would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Owner whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
